title: AFN Hosts Treasury’s First Official Visit to Alaska
summary: Anchorage, AK – August 29, 2024 – The Alaska Federation of Natives proudly hosted the U.S. Department of Treasury for its first official visit to Alaska on Tuesday, August 27, 2024. This landmark trip marks a significant milestone in the ongoing dialogue between Treasury and Alaska tribes, tribal or...

title: 2 rural Alaska precincts fail to open for primary voting
summary: Andrew Kitchenman Alaska Beacon Voting stations in Wales and Kaktovik never opened for the primary on Tuesday, Aug. 20, according to the Alaska Division of Elections director. “Despite trying multiple ways to contact the poll workers, the individuals we had hired for those communities were unrespons...

title: Alaska’s Cowboy of the Skies
summary: Above: Paul Claus At 24 hours old, Paul Claus took his first flight in a Piper Super Cub. Sixty-five years later, he can still be found soaring across Alaska’s skies, as captivated by wilderness as when he was a child. Whether dropping off mountaineering expeditions or taking guests from his family’...

title: PRESS RELEASE: SNC Announces the Hire of Matt Thorpe as COO
summary: Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) is pleased to announce the appointment of Matt Thorpe as our new Chief Operations Officer (COO)/Corporate Development. With a track record of leadership and strategic growth, Matt brings a wealth of experience to SNC, where he will drive our operational excellence...
